approach: Three new components (Hero/Plan/Tabs) recomposing existing cards; signature elements as token-driven CSS+SVG; tab state via a Preact signal; visual loop = Storybook screenshots + impeccable (rendered+source) + taste critique

decisions.decision: tab state as an in-memory signal
decisions.why: matches the webview reactive idiom; persistence adds state bugs for no reviewer value

decisions.decision: hero absorbs PR/checkpoints/lastAction; Intent+Approach cards deleted
decisions.why: run-status facts belong in the summary strip; two cards fully absorbed by Plan+Hero
decisions.rejected: keeping vestigial cards alongside the new sections

decisions.decision: sr-only h2 names each tab panel
decisions.why: fixes the skipped-heading outline in every state incl. legacy where Plan is absent
decisions.rejected: visible per-tab headings (duplicate the tab label)

plan.summary: hero+plan+tabs recomposition, 6 signature elements, visual verification gate
plan.key_finding: PhasesCard already computes per-step durations — bars extend it without new derivation

implement.summary: hero+plan+tabs shipped with 6 signature elements; visual loop caught a real bug and drove 7 impeccable fixes
implement.key_finding: looking at rendered output found what code review could not — the legacy status-vocabulary mismatch
